brand_dna.category: Precision quilting tools - rulers, guides, grip strips and safety accessories that help quilters cut and sew quilt pieces accurately.
brand_dna.core_belief: Saving costly fabric matters more than ever for quilters in today's economy - tools should eliminate the guesswork so anyone can piece perfectly with no fabric waste.
proof_points: Trusted by thousands of quilters worldwide
30-day return policy on new, unused items in original packaging
brand_dna.positioning: Problem-solving specialist tools for accuracy-obsessed quilters, sitting above generic acrylic rulers as the fabric-saving, no-slip upgrade.

voice_pillars.name: Accuracy-Obsessed
voice_pillars.desc: Every line promises precise, repeatable results and frames the product around exactness.
voice_pillars.quote: Square up and cut fabric with unmatched precision, sew perfect 1/4-inch seams

voice_pillars.name: Frustration-Killer
voice_pillars.desc: They name the quilter's pain points directly and position the tools as the fix.
voice_pillars.quote: No more cutting errors, seam ripping, or slipping rulers.

voice_pillars.name: Effortlessly Simple
voice_pillars.desc: Copy leans on ease and low-friction language so any skill level feels capable.
voice_pillars.quote: Make quilt blocks any size using just one measurement

voice_pillars.name: Reassuringly Safe
voice_pillars.desc: They highlight finger protection and safety while working with sharp rotary blades.
voice_pillars.quote: Protect Your Fingers Against Sharp Rotary Cutters!

phrases: Let the Guide Catch the Fabric's Edge for Instant Accuracy
No math. No templates. No dies.
For Quilters of Any Skill Level

icp: Home quilters of any skill level who value precision and hate wasting expensive fabric, and who buy tools that remove math, slipping, and cutting errors from block-making.

personas.name: Precision Piecer
personas.description: Detail-driven quilter chasing perfect 1/4-inch seams and squared-up blocks - moved by accuracy and 'no more seam ripping' messaging.

personas.name: Fabric-Saving Pragmatist
personas.description: Budget-conscious quilter watching costs in today's economy - moved by zero fabric waste and getting cuts right the first time.

personas.name: Math-Averse Maker
personas.description: Quilter intimidated by resizing and seam-allowance math - moved by 'make any block any size, no math' simplicity.

banned.claim: The best non-slip solution in the world / #1 quilting ruler
banned.why: FTC - unqualified superlative that cannot be objectively substantiated.

banned.claim: Guaranteed perfect blocks every time with zero errors
banned.why: FTC - guaranteed-results claim; outcomes depend on user technique.
FTC - invented review count; no reviews were provided to substantiate.

banned.claim: Only X left - order in the next 10 minutes
banned.why: Fake urgency not supported by any real inventory or time limit on site.

banned.claim: Recommended by professional quilters and top designers
banned.why: FTC - invented endorsement with no documented source.

banned.claim: 'Unbreakable' meaning it can never break under any use
banned.why: FTC - objective durability claim must be qualified and provable, not absolute.
